title: Robin Learns About Poseidon
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4. The central beat is robin learns about poseidon.
scene: The scene focuses on robin learns about poseidon, with Robin, Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Each bearing the name of a God.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Including both pirates, and the government...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I ate too much. I'm stuffed.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji's recovering from a mermaid overdose.

summary: Robin Learns About Poseidon. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
